note: Invalidation/contradiction vein still yields net-new; Mem0 forgetting gated on entity nodes.

claim: EXTENDS contradiction-detection (H/S): deterministic temporal rule — if old edge valid_at precedes new edge valid_at, auto-invalidate, BEYOND relation-type conflicts. Our contradiction-detection only has CONFLICTING_RELATIONS relation-pair rules.

NET-NEW (M/M): finds invalidation candidates via hybrid SEMANTIC search across DIFFERENT node pairs — an existing edge can be invalidated by a new contradicting fact across different pairs. Our detection only queries same source_id+target_id.
OVERLAP-BANKED: separate invalid_at (event-time) from expired_at (tombstone-recorded). = banked GR-five-timestamp-edge(expired_at half) + MEM-fact-invalidation-event-time consolidation. Re-confirm.
OVERLAP-BANKED: small-LLM populates valid_at/invalid_at from fact text + reference_time. = the LLM-discovery half of GR-llm-fact-invalidation, already split to Wave-2 NEEDS-BENCHMARK.
GATED (L/L): ref-counted entity-link cleanup on delete (strip memory ref, delete orphaned entities). Requires an entity-node abstraction our memory-ID graph lacks. Park (Wave-2).
maps_to: lib/storage/causal-edges.ts (needs entity-node abstraction — does not exist)
